description: This file defines a Config class used for managing configuration objects within the Bootstrap framework. It includes methods for retrieving default configurations, merging configurations with data attributes, and type checking configuration options. It also exports the Config class as the default export.

classes.name: Config
classes.description: A class providing utility methods for managing component configurations, including default values, merging, and type validation.

methods.name: static get DefaultType
methods.description: Returns the default types for configuration options.

methods.name: static get NAME
methods.description: Getter that should be overridden to return the component's name; throws an error if not implemented.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Retrieves and processes the configuration object, including merging and type checking.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Hook for processing configuration after merging; by default returns the config unchanged.

methods.name: _mergeConfigObj
methods.description: Merges default config, data attributes, and provided config into a single configuration object.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Validates the types of configuration options against expected types, throws error if mismatch.
